assertions.title: Constituent Merge Does Not Drop Existing Watchlist Stocks

steps.action: Run: sqlite3 data/market.db "SELECT ticker FROM watchlist WHERE ticker IN ('000001', '600519', '000002', '600036', '601318') ORDER BY ticker;"
Inspect scripts/expand_stock_universe.py for INSERT OR IGNORE usage
steps.expected: INSERT OR IGNORE or UPSERT to avoid dropping rows
steps.observed: Line 167: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO watchlist; merge_with_watchlist() computes new_tickers = constituents - existing, only inserting new entries

evidence.codeInspection: expand_stock_universe.py uses INSERT OR IGNORE at lines 167, 236, 308, 367. merge_with_watchlist() preserves existing by computing diff only.

assertions.title: Stock Sectors Table Updated for New Stocks

Test import: .venv/bin/python -c "from scripts.expand_stock_universe import StockUniverseExpander, main"

evidence.codeInspection: Script has shebang (#!/usr/bin/env python3), main() function, StockUniverseExpander class, if __name__ == '__main__' guard. Uses INSERT OR IGNORE for idempotency.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed. VAL-INFRA-007: watchlist has 1938 distinct tickers (>= 800 required). VAL-INFRA-008: all pre-existing stocks preserved via INSERT OR IGNORE. VAL-INFRA-012: stock_sectors has 1938 distinct tickers (>= 800 required). VAL-INFRA-013: expansion script exists, has valid syntax, imports cleanly, and has CLI entry point.
